sales.title:
ATTICA. Athens. Ca. 455-440 BC. AR tetradrachm (25mm, 17.19 gm, 8h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5. Early transitional issue. Head of Athena right, wearing crested Attic helmet ornamented with three laurel leaves and vine scroll / ΑΘΕ, owl standing right, head facing; olive sprig with berry and crescent moon behind, all within incuse square. HGC 4, 1597. HID05401242017 © 2025 Heritage Auctions | All Rights Reserved www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice
Ancients

ATTICA. Athens. Ca. 465-455 BC. AR tetradrachm (23mm, 17.18 gm, 2h). NGC XF 5/5 - 4/5, die shift. Head of Athena right, wearing crested Attic helmet ornamented with three laurel leaves and vine scroll / AΘE, owl standing right, head facing; olive sprig with berry and crescent moon behind, all within incuse square. HGC 4, 1596. Starr Group V. HID05401242017 © 2025 Heritage Auctions | All Rights Reserved www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice
Ancients

Ancients
ATTICA. Athens. Ca. 455-440 BC. AR tetradrachm (24mm, 17.12 gm, 8h). NGC XF 5/5 - 4/5, Fine Style, edge cut. Early transitional issue. Head of Athena right, wearing crested Attic helmet ornamented with three laurel leaves and vine scroll / ΑΘΕ, owl standing right, head facing; olive sprig with berry and crescent moon behind, all within incuse square. HGC 4, 1597. Splendid, rainbow toning. HID05401242017 © 2025 Heritage Auctions | All Rights Reserved www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice

ATTICA. Athens. Ca. 455-440 BC. AR tetradrachm (24mm, 17.16 gm, 5h). NGC Choice AU 5/5 - 3/5, Fine Style, brushed. Early transitional issue. Head of Athena right, wearing crested Attic helmet ornamented with three laurel leaves and vine scroll / ΑΘΕ, owl standing right, head facing; olive sprig with berry and crescent moon behind, all within incuse square. HGC 4, 1597. Crisp devices from a firm strike show off lovingly crafted Fine Style dies. HID05401242017 © 2025 Heritage Auctions | All Rights Reserved www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice
